title: Switzerland (Canton Zürich) Agricultural/Forestry Income Worksheet — Simplified Statements (Hilfsblatt G für Land- und Forstwirtschaft)
description: The Canton of Zürich's companion schedule to the personal income and wealth tax return for natural persons (ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen), used by a taxpayer with agricultural or forestry income who is eligible for, and elects, simplified statement-based reporting (nach vereinfachten Aufstellungen) rather than full farm bookkeeping or the more complex questionnaire, Hilfsblatt B (Fragebogen für Land- und Forstwirtschaft, Form 330, not modelled by this document). Eligibility is limited to smaller operations: in the Talzone, up to 8 ha of agricultural utilized area; in the voralpine Hügelzone or Bergzonen, up to 20 Rindergrossvieheinheiten; each with only a limited scope of special branches (livestock up to 60 fattening-pig places/10 breeding sows/500 laying hens; crop cultivation up to 1 ha in total). This document models: the household header (AHVN13, municipality, name, and the filer-entered tax year, since this form — like its sibling companion schedules — is hosted at a year-independent URL); two depreciation/value-adjustment table summaries (Ziffer 1.1 machinery and plantings; Ziffer 1.2 real estate); the full, letter-by-letter farm income computation (Ziffer 2.1a-k, including three running Zwischentotal subtotals and the final Total Betriebseinkünfte); the full farm expense computation (Ziffer 2.2a-i, including the Ziffer 2.2e disposals/depreciation subtotal and the final Total Betriebsaufwendungen); the resulting Reineinkünfte (Ziffer 2.3); the operational detail in Ziffer 3.1-3.8 (operated land areas, land use by crop category, livestock counts, special federal/cantonal payments, special operating branches, production zone, real-estate transactions, and any secondary trade); and the signature block. It does NOT model: the Ziffer 1.1/1.2 depreciation tables' own per-category, per-metric cell breakdown, an unbounded/multi-dimensional repeating structure collapsed to two free-text summary fields per this registry's established treatment (see e.g. ch/zh/sta/hilfsblatt-a-vereinfachte-buchfuehrung); the Ziffer 3.1 land-use table's own itemized, filer-named municipality/canton/country rows, an unbounded repeating structure collapsed to one free-text summary field, while its bounded 'Total' row is modelled individually; or Hilfsblatt B (Form 330, the larger, non-simplified sibling questionnaire for farms exceeding this form's own size thresholds), deliberately out of scope for this cycle (see VERIFICATION.md). It does not submit the return; the live source (zh.ch / the ZHprivateTax online filing portal) is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Switzerland, the Canton of Zürich, or its Kantonales Steueramt.

authority.name: Kanton Zürich — Finanzdirektion, Kantonales Steueramt Zürich

source.documentRef: StA Form 331 (2020) 12.20 — Hilfsblatt G für Land- und Forstwirtschaft, Kanton Zürich (4-page schedule: Seite 1 header + Ziffer 1 Abschreibungstabellen; Seite 2 Ziffer 2.1 Ermittlung der Betriebseinkünfte; Seite 3 Ziffer 2.2 Ermittlung der Betriebsaufwendungen and Ziffer 2.3 Reineinkünfte; Seite 4 signature and Ziffer 3 Angaben über den Betrieb), read together with the main return it is a companion to, ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen, whose own Ziffer 2 (Seite 2) this document's own Reineinkünfte transfers to, and with the Kantonales Steueramt Zürich's own dedicated 'Wegleitung zum Hilfsblatt B'/'Wegleitung zum Hilfsblatt G' (StA Form 332 (2025) 12.25) at https://www.zh.ch/content/dam/zhweb/bilder-dokumente/themen/steuern-finanzen/steuern/natuerlichepersonen/2025/est-wegleitungen/332%20Wegleitung%20HiB%20HiG%20ZH%202025%20bf%20DEF.pdf, which confirms this document's Ziffer numbering, its flat-rate deduction schedules for Ziffer 2.2i, and its Merkblatt-sourced depreciation rates and Naturalbezüge/Privatanteil valuation rates (discussed in VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: GOV-1917: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Picks up the sole remaining CH-ZH companion-schedule gap the GOV-1910 (Hilfsblatt A mit kaufmännischer Buchführung, Form 329) cycle left open by name — Hilfsblatt B (Form 330, agricultural questionnaire, larger/more complex) and Hilfsblatt G (Form 331, agricultural/forestry, simplified) — pursuing only Form 331/Hilfsblatt G, the narrower, simplified-eligibility variant serving smaller farms (Talzone up to 8 ha, or hill/mountain zones up to 20 Rindergrossvieheinheiten, with limited special branches), while Hilfsblatt B (Form 330, the larger questionnaire for farms exceeding those thresholds, with its own dual bookkeeping/records computation paths) remains deferred as a separate, distinct future candidate — now the sole remaining CH-ZH companion-schedule backlog item. The form (331_hig_zh_2020_def.pdf, 95,074 bytes, 4 pages, %PDF-1.5, no /Encrypt) was fetched directly from the same 'Formulare für Selbständigerwerbende' zh.ch listing every prior CH-ZH cycle has used. A byte-level scan for '/AcroForm' (zero matches) and '/Widget' (zero matches) confirms this is a flat, non-AcroForm print/reference PDF, the same shape as all nine of its CH-ZH sibling schedules. The listing page's own on-page label for this form ('Hilfsblatt G für Land- und Forstwirtschaft') was re-checked and carries no 'bis <year>' cutoff qualifier, confirming — via the same label-vs-filename technique the GOV-1910 cycle documented — that this is zh.ch's own current, unsuperseded edition despite its 2020-dated filename. A further, previously-undocumented residual discrepancy was found and is disclosed here: the companion 2025-vintage 'Wegleitung zum Hilfsblatt B/G' (StA Form 332) embeds its own illustrative facsimile of this form's page 1, stamped 'StA Form 331 (2024) 12.25' rather than the standalone downloadable PDF's own '(2020) 12.20' stamp — textually identical in header layout, Ziffer numbering, and footnote text to the form actually fetched and modelled here, so this cycle treats it as a periodic print-run reprint rather than a content revision, but flags it explicitly for a future cycle to re-check should zh.ch ever republish Form 331 under a newer standalone filename. This cycle additionally discovered — by searching the main return's own 2025 Wegleitung, which points filers of agricultural income to 'die Wegleitung zu diesen Hilfsblättern' rather than reproducing Hilfsblatt B/G's own rules — a dedicated, previously-unused companion Wegleitung specific to Hilfsblatt B/G (StA Form 332 (2025) 12.25, 'Wegleitung HiB HiG ZH 2025 bf DEF.pdf', 145,979 bytes, 8 pages, fetched directly, HTTP 200), which independently corroborates this schema's own Ziffer 2.2a-i lettering (e.g. its own worked flat-rate-deduction schedule cites 'Ziffer 2.2i' and 'Ziffer 2.1g' by the same letters modelled here), the Ziffer-2-of-the-main-return transfer (via its structurally equivalent Hilfsblatt-B Ziffer 1.6 guidance, 'Übertrag in Ziffer 2 der Steuererklärung'), and the Naturalbezüge/Privatanteil/depreciation valuation rates cited in this schema's own field descriptions (Merkblatt NL 1/2007 and Merkblatt A/2001, both bound into the same PDF as trailing annexes) — but it does not reproduce a worked, fully-numeric specimen of Hilfsblatt G's own internal Ziffer 1-3 lines with real figures, the same class of negative finding several prior CH-ZH cycles have already made for their own forms. This schema's own worked mock-data example (see VERIFICATION.md) was therefore constructed independently and its arithmetic hand-recomputed end-to-end (the three running Zwischentotal subtotals and final Total Betriebseinkünfte of Ziffer 2.1, the Ziffer 2.2e subtotal and final Total Betriebsaufwendungen, Ziffer 2.3 Reineinkünfte, and the Ziffer 3.1/3.2 Total rows), not copied from any official specimen. Switzerland remains at 2 of its 6 verticals (DMV, Taxes) — a companion schedule, not a new vertical — but completes CH-ZH's companion-schedule backlog down to a single remaining item, Hilfsblatt B (Form 330). See VERIFICATION.md for the full field-by-field source mapping, every disclosed scope decision, and the worked mock-data example.

fields.name: jahr
fields.label: Jahr
fields.description: The tax year this worksheet is filed for, entered by the filer since this form is hosted at a year-independent URL and carries no tax year printed on its own cover.

fields.name: ahvn13RemainingDigits
fields.label: AHVN13 (13-stellig)
fields.description: The remaining 10 digits of the taxpayer's 13-digit Swiss social security number (AHVN13); the first three digits, 756 (Switzerland's fixed country prefix), are pre-printed in the form's own boxes.

fields.name: gemeinde
fields.label: Gemeinde
fields.description: The taxpayer's municipality of residence (Gemeinde) within Canton Zürich.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The taxpayer's surname.

fields.name: vorname
fields.label: Vorname
fields.description: The taxpayer's first name(s).

fields.name: maschinenPflanzungenDepreciationSummary
fields.label: 1.1 Maschinen (inkl. Fahrzeuge und Geräte), Pflanzungen, Obst-, Beeren-, Rebkulturen
fields.description: Free-text summary of the machinery/plantings depreciation table (Ziffer 1.1): for each of two asset columns (Maschinen inkl. Fahrzeuge und Geräte; Pflanzungen, Obst-, Beeren-, Rebkulturen), the opening book value (Buchwert per Ende Vorjahr), additions (Zugänge Steuerjahr), disposals (Abgänge Steuerjahr), value before depreciation, booked depreciation (Steuerjahr), and closing book value (Buchwert per Ende Steuerjahr) — a 2-category x 6-metric cross-tabulation. Collapsed to one field per this registry's established treatment of unbounded/multi-dimensional repeating tables (see e.g. ch/zh/sta/hilfsblatt-a-vereinfachte-buchfuehrung's depreciationScheduleSummary). Applicable depreciation rates (per the companion Wegleitung's own Merkblatt A/2001) are 20%/40% (Fahrzeuge, Maschinen; on cost/on book value respectively), 6%/12% (Reben ab Vollertrag), and 10%/20% (Obstanlagen ab Vollertrag).

fields.name: liegenschaftDepreciationSummary
fields.label: 1.2 Liegenschaft (ohne Pflanzungen, Obst-, Beeren-, Rebkulturen)
fields.description: Free-text summary of the real-estate depreciation/value-adjustment table (Ziffer 1.2), completed only when the property is used predominantly for business purposes ('Nur ausfüllen bei überwiegend geschäftlicher Nutzung'): for each of up to four columns (Gesamte nicht aufgeteilte Liegenschaft, or split into Gebäude inkl. mech. Einrichtungen / Pflanzen inkl. Meliorationen / Boden), the opening asset value (Anlagewert per Ende Vorjahr), additions, disposals, closing asset value, and cumulative/current-year depreciation-or-value-adjustment (Abschreibungen/Wertverminderungen) through the prior year-end and through the current year-end — a bounded but variably-split cross-tabulation. Collapsed to one free-text field for the same reason as maschinenPflanzungenDepreciationSummary. Per the form's own footnote, a value adjustment (Wertberichtigung) on the Boden (land) column is only permissible where an inflated acquisition price can be evidenced under Art. 66 BGBB (Bundesgesetz über das bäuerliche Bodenrecht); per the companion Wegleitung's own Merkblatt A/2001, ordinary depreciation rates are 0% (Boden), 1.5%/3% (Gesamtsatz where land/buildings/Meliorationen/Pflanzen are not separately itemized), 5%/10% (Meliorationen: Entwässerungen, Güterzusammenlegungskosten), 1%/2% (Wohnhäuser), 2%/4% (Gesamtsatz Gebäude und Bauernhäuser), 3%/6% (Ökonomiegebäude), 5%/10% (Leichtbauten, Schweineställe, Geflügelhallen, Silos, Bewässerungen), and 12%/25% (mechanische Einrichtungen).

fields.name: ertraegeAckerbau
fields.label: 2.1a Ackerbau (inkl. Ackerbaubeiträge)
fields.description: Revenue from arable/field crop farming, including any arable-farming subsidies (Ackerbaubeiträge) received — the same Ackerbaubeiträge total optionally itemized again at ackerbaubeitraegeInsgesamt (Ziffer 3.4), which the form requires to already be included here.

fields.name: ertraegeRebObstUndGemuesebau
fields.label: 2.1a Reb-, Obst- und Gemüsebau
fields.description: Revenue from viticulture, fruit-growing, and vegetable-growing.

fields.name: ertraegeWaldbau
fields.label: 2.1a Waldbau
fields.description: Revenue from forestry (timber and related silvicultural activity).

fields.name: ertraegeHeuGrasverkaufWeitereErtraege
fields.label: 2.1a Heu-, Grasverkauf, weitere Erträge
fields.description: Revenue from hay and grass sales, plus any further crop-related revenue not itemized in the other Ziffer 2.1a lines.

fields.name: rindviehMilchUndMilchprodukte
fields.label: 2.1b Rindvieh — Milch und Milchprodukte
fields.description: Revenue from cattle milk and dairy products.

fields.name: rindviehFleischUndTierverkaeufe
fields.label: 2.1b Rindvieh — Fleisch- und Tierverkäufe (+)
fields.description: Revenue from cattle meat and livestock sales.

fields.name: abzueglichRindviehTierzukaeufe
fields.label: 2.1b Rindvieh — abzüglich Tierzukäufe (–)
fields.description: Cattle purchased during the year, deducted from cattle-related revenue.

fields.name: schweineFleischUndTierverkaeufe
fields.label: 2.1b Schweine — Fleisch- und Tierverkäufe
fields.description: Revenue from pig meat and livestock sales.

fields.name: abzueglichSchweineTierzukaeufe
fields.label: 2.1b Schweine — abzüglich Tierzukäufe (–)
fields.description: Pigs purchased during the year, deducted from pig-related revenue.

fields.name: gefluegelAndereEierFleischTierverkaeufeWeitereErloese
fields.label: 2.1b Geflügel, andere Tiere — Eier-, Fleisch-, Tierverkäufe, weitere Erlöse
fields.description: Revenue from poultry and other animals: egg, meat, and livestock sales, plus further proceeds.

fields.name: abzueglichGefluegelAndereTierzukaeufe
fields.label: 2.1b Geflügel, andere Tiere — abzüglich Tierzukäufe (–)
fields.description: Poultry/other animals purchased during the year, deducted from poultry/other-animal revenue.

fields.name: arbeitenFuerDritteFutterUndWeidegelder
fields.label: 2.1c Arbeiten für Dritte, Futter- und Weidegelder
fields.description: Revenue from work performed for third parties, plus fodder and grazing fees received.

fields.name: besondereLeistungenBundKanton
fields.label: 2.1d Besondere Leistungen des Bundes und des Kantons
fields.description: Special federal and cantonal payments (e.g. direct payments/Direktzahlungen) received during the year. The same headline concept is itemized into its component subsidy types at Ziffer 3.4 (direktzahlungenInsgesamt and its five-line breakdown); in a consistent filing the two should agree.

fields.name: zwischentotalErtraegeArbeitenBeitraege
fields.label: 2.1 Zwischentotal (nach Ziffer d)
fields.description: Running subtotal of Betriebseinkünfte through Ziffer 2.1d: ertraegeAckerbau plus ertraegeRebObstUndGemuesebau plus ertraegeWaldbau plus ertraegeHeuGrasverkaufWeitereErtraege plus rindviehMilchUndMilchprodukte plus rindviehFleischUndTierverkaeufe minus abzueglichRindviehTierzukaeufe plus schweineFleischUndTierverkaeufe minus abzueglichSchweineTierzukaeufe plus gefluegelAndereEierFleischTierverkaeufeWeitereErloese minus abzueglichGefluegelAndereTierzukaeufe plus arbeitenFuerDritteFutterUndWeidegelder plus besondereLeistungenBundKanton.

fields.name: naturalbezuegeErwachsene
fields.label: 2.1e Naturalbezüge — Erwachsene (zu CHF 960.– oder CHF ...)
fields.description: Imputed value of goods withdrawn from the farm's own production for adult household/staff members' own consumption, at the standard rate of CHF 960 per adult per year (or a lower rate the filer may substitute per the companion Wegleitung's own Merkblatt NL 1/2007, e.g. CHF 600 without milk, or CHF 240 for a livestock-free operation).

fields.name: naturalbezuegeKinderBis6Jahre
fields.label: 2.1e Naturalbezüge — Kinder (–6 Jahre, zu CHF 240.– oder CHF ...)
fields.description: Same as naturalbezuegeErwachsene, for children up to age 6, at the standard rate of CHF 240 per child per year.

fields.name: naturalbezuegeKinder6Bis13Jahre
fields.label: 2.1e Naturalbezüge — Kinder (6–13 Jahre, zu CHF 480.– oder CHF ...)
fields.description: Same as naturalbezuegeErwachsene, for children aged 6 to 13, at the standard rate of CHF 480 per child per year.

fields.name: naturalbezuegeKinder13Bis18Jahre
fields.label: 2.1e Naturalbezüge — Kinder (13–18 Jahre, zu CHF 720.– oder CHF ...)
fields.description: Same as naturalbezuegeErwachsene, for children aged 13 to 18, at the standard rate of CHF 720 per child per year. Per the companion Wegleitung, families with more than 3 children reduce the total children's-bracket value: 10% for 4 children, 20% for 5, 30% for 6 or more.

fields.name: kaesereibezuege
fields.label: 2.1e Käsereibezüge (wenn Milchgeld netto verbucht)
fields.description: Imputed value of dairy/cheese-making withdrawals, completed only when milk proceeds are booked net (i.e. milk delivered to a dairy is recorded net of the farm's own withdrawal).

fields.name: mietwertBetriebsleiterwohnung
fields.label: 2.1f Mietwert der Betriebsleiterwohnung
fields.description: Imputed rental value of the farm operator's own dwelling on the business premises. Per the form's own footnote, for a mixed-use property that is predominantly privately used, this value (and the property's maintenance costs) should instead be declared on the Liegenschaftenverzeichnis or at Ziffer 6 of the main return, with no depreciation claimed on that property here.

fields.name: mietUndPachtzinsen
fields.label: 2.1f Miet- und Pachtzinsen
fields.description: Rental and lease income received from letting out farm property or land, subject to the same mixed-use-property footnote as mietwertBetriebsleiterwohnung.

fields.name: privatanteilAuto
fields.label: 2.1g Privatanteile an Betriebsausgaben — Auto
fields.description: Private-use share of vehicle costs added back as income, completed only when the corresponding private expenditure was itself booked as a business expense under Ziffer 2.2.

fields.name: privatanteilVersicherungen
fields.label: 2.1g Privatanteile an Betriebsausgaben — Versicherungen
fields.description: Private-use share of insurance premiums added back as income, same completion condition as privatanteilAuto.

fields.name: privatanteilHeizungStromTelefonTv
fields.label: 2.1g Privatanteile an Betriebsausgaben — Heizung, Strom, Telefon, TV
fields.description: Private-use share of heating, electricity, telephone, and television costs added back as income, same completion condition as privatanteilAuto. Per the companion Wegleitung's own Merkblatt NL 1/2007, the standard annual private-use rate is CHF 2,640 for the first adult (CHF 3,540 in above-average circumstances, CHF 2,100 in very modest circumstances), plus a per-additional-adult and per-child surcharge.

fields.name: privatanteilLoehneBetriebsangestellteAndere
fields.label: 2.1g Privatanteile an Betriebsausgaben — Löhne von Betriebsangest., andere
fields.description: Private-use share of employee wages (for staff time spent on the operator's private household) and other private-use shares not separately itemized above.

fields.name: andereGeschaeftsertraegeGemaessAufstellung
fields.label: 2.1h Andere Geschäftserträge gemäss separater Aufstellung
fields.description: Other business income not captured in the lines above, per a separate itemized statement.

fields.name: zwischentotalNaturalbezuegeMietwerteUndPrivatanteile
fields.label: 2.1 Zwischentotal (nach Ziffer h)
fields.description: Running subtotal of Betriebseinkünfte through Ziffer 2.1h: zwischentotalErtraegeArbeitenBeitraege plus naturalbezuegeErwachsene plus naturalbezuegeKinderBis6Jahre plus naturalbezuegeKinder6Bis13Jahre plus naturalbezuegeKinder13Bis18Jahre plus kaesereibezuege plus mietwertBetriebsleiterwohnung plus mietUndPachtzinsen plus privatanteilAuto plus privatanteilVersicherungen plus privatanteilHeizungStromTelefonTv plus privatanteilLoehneBetriebsangestellteAndere plus andereGeschaeftsertraegeGemaessAufstellung.

fields.name: bestandJahresendeRindvieh
fields.label: 2.1i Bestand Jahresende — Tiere: Rindvieh
fields.description: Closing (year-end) inventory value of cattle stock.

fields.name: bestandJahresendeSchweine
fields.label: 2.1i Bestand Jahresende — Tiere: Schweine
fields.description: Closing (year-end) inventory value of pig stock.

fields.name: bestandJahresendeGefluegelAndereTiere
fields.label: 2.1i Bestand Jahresende — Tiere: Geflügel, andere Tiere
fields.description: Closing (year-end) inventory value of poultry and other animal stock.

fields.name: bestandJahresendeVorraete
fields.label: 2.1i Bestand Jahresende — Vorräte
fields.description: Closing (year-end) inventory value of stored produce/supplies (Vorräte).

fields.name: zwischentotalInklBestandJahresende
fields.label: 2.1 Zwischentotal (nach Ziffer i)
fields.description: Running subtotal of Betriebseinkünfte through Ziffer 2.1i: zwischentotalNaturalbezuegeMietwerteUndPrivatanteile plus bestandJahresendeRindvieh plus bestandJahresendeSchweine plus bestandJahresendeGefluegelAndereTiere plus bestandJahresendeVorraete — closing stock/inventory values are added, per this form's own farm-accounting convention of taxing the year's stock-value increase as income.

fields.name: bestandJahresbeginnRindvieh
fields.label: 2.1k Bestand Jahresbeginn — Tiere: Rindvieh
fields.description: Opening (start-of-year) inventory value of cattle stock, subtracted from the running Betriebseinkünfte subtotal since it was already accounted for as the prior year's closing stock.

fields.name: bestandJahresbeginnSchweine
fields.label: 2.1k Bestand Jahresbeginn — Tiere: Schweine
fields.description: Opening (start-of-year) inventory value of pig stock, subtracted from the running Betriebseinkünfte subtotal for the same reason as bestandJahresbeginnRindvieh.

fields.name: bestandJahresbeginnGefluegelAndereTiere
fields.label: 2.1k Bestand Jahresbeginn — Tiere: Geflügel, andere Tiere
fields.description: Opening (start-of-year) inventory value of poultry and other animal stock, subtracted from the running Betriebseinkünfte subtotal for the same reason as bestandJahresbeginnRindvieh.

fields.name: bestandJahresbeginnVorraete
fields.label: 2.1k Bestand Jahresbeginn — Vorräte (–)
fields.description: Opening (start-of-year) inventory value of stored produce/supplies, subtracted from the running Betriebseinkünfte subtotal for the same reason as bestandJahresbeginnRindvieh; the form's own print marks this specific line with a minus sign.

fields.name: totalBetriebseinkuenfte
fields.label: 2.1 Total Betriebseinkünfte
fields.description: Total business income: zwischentotalInklBestandJahresende minus bestandJahresbeginnRindvieh minus bestandJahresbeginnSchweine minus bestandJahresbeginnGefluegelAndereTiere minus bestandJahresbeginnVorraete. Feeds reineinkuenfte (Ziffer 2.3) together with totalBetriebsaufwendungen.

fields.name: duengerSaatgutPflanzenschutz
fields.label: 2.2a Dünger, Saatgut, Pflanzenschutz
fields.description: Cost of fertilizer, seed, and crop protection. Per the form's own note, in the Berggebiet (mountain zone) and vHz (voralpine Hügelzone), no deduction is claimed here if the flat-rate deduction for remaining operating costs (Ziffer 2.2i) is used instead.

fields.name: hagelversicherungspraemie
fields.label: 2.2a Hagelversicherungsprämie
fields.description: Hail insurance premium paid for crops, subject to the same Berggebiet/vHz flat-rate note as duengerSaatgutPflanzenschutz.

fields.name: uebrigeKostenPflanzenbau
fields.label: 2.2a Übrige Kosten des Pflanzenbaus
fields.description: Other crop-farming costs not separately itemized, subject to the same Berggebiet/vHz flat-rate note as duengerSaatgutPflanzenschutz.

fields.name: treibUndSchmierstoffe
fields.label: 2.2b Treib- und Schmierstoffe
fields.description: Cost of fuel and lubricants for farm machinery.

fields.name: repUnterhaltKleinwerkzeuge
fields.label: 2.2b Rep., Unterhalt, Kleinwerkzeuge
fields.description: Cost of repairs, maintenance, and small tools for farm machinery.

fields.name: arbeitenDurchDritte
fields.label: 2.2b Arbeiten durch Dritte
fields.description: Cost of machinery/traction work performed by third parties (contractors) — the mirror-image expense of arbeitenFuerDritteFutterUndWeidegelder (Ziffer 2.1c), which is the same concept as income rather than expense.

fields.name: futterzukaufFuttergeldRindvieh
fields.label: 2.2c Futterzukauf, Futtergeld f. Rindvieh
fields.description: Cost of purchased feed and grazing/fodder fees for cattle.

fields.name: futterzukaufSchweine
fields.label: 2.2c Futterzukauf für Schweine
fields.description: Cost of purchased feed for pigs.

fields.name: futterGefluegelAndereTiere
fields.label: 2.2c Futter für Geflügel, andere Tiere
fields.description: Cost of feed for poultry and other animals.

fields.name: tierarztMedikamenteBesamung
fields.label: 2.2c Tierarzt, Medikamente, Besamung
fields.description: Cost of veterinary services, medication, and insemination.

fields.name: uebrigeKostenTierhaltung
fields.label: 2.2c Übrige Kosten der Tierhaltung
fields.description: Other livestock-keeping costs not separately itemized.

fields.name: liegenschaftenUnterhaltskosten
fields.label: 2.2d Liegenschaften-Unterhaltskosten
fields.description: Property maintenance costs. Per the form's own footnote, for a mixed-use property that is predominantly privately used, this cost should instead be declared on the Liegenschaftenverzeichnis or at Ziffer 8 of the main return (a different Ziffer than the mirror-image footnote at Ziffer 2.1f, which points to the main return's own Ziffer 6), with no depreciation claimed on that property here.

fields.name: abschreibungenMaschinen
fields.label: 2.2e Abgänge und Abschreibungen/Wertverminderungen — Maschinen
fields.description: Disposals and depreciation/value reduction on machinery, drawn from the Ziffer 1.1 depreciation table.

fields.name: abschreibungenObstBeerenReben
fields.label: 2.2e Abgänge und Abschreibungen/Wertverminderungen — Obst, Beeren, Reben
fields.description: Disposals and depreciation/value reduction on fruit, berry, and vine plantings, drawn from the Ziffer 1.1 depreciation table.

fields.name: abschreibungenGebaeudeMechEinrichtungen
fields.label: 2.2e Abgänge und Abschreibungen/Wertverminderungen — Gebäude (nur Abschreibungen), mech. Einrichtungen
fields.description: Depreciation only (no disposals) on buildings, plus disposals/depreciation on mechanical fixtures, drawn from the Ziffer 1.2 depreciation table; subject to the same mixed-use-property footnote as liegenschaftenUnterhaltskosten (no depreciation on a predominantly privately-used property).

fields.name: abschreibungenPflanzenMeliorationen
fields.label: 2.2e Abgänge und Abschreibungen/Wertverminderungen — Pflanzen, Meliorationen
fields.description: Disposals and depreciation/value reduction on plantings and land-improvement works (Meliorationen), drawn from the Ziffer 1.2 depreciation table.

fields.name: zwischentotalAbgaengeAbschreibungen
fields.label: 2.2e Zwischentotal
fields.description: Subtotal of Ziffer 2.2e: abschreibungenMaschinen plus abschreibungenObstBeerenReben plus abschreibungenGebaeudeMechEinrichtungen plus abschreibungenPflanzenMeliorationen.

fields.name: barloehne
fields.label: 2.2f Bar- und Naturallöhne an Betriebsangestellte — Barlöhne
fields.description: Cash wages paid to farm employees.

fields.name: sozialleistungenAngestellte
fields.label: 2.2f Sozialleistungen für Angestellte
fields.description: Social-insurance contributions and benefits paid for farm employees.

fields.name: verpflegungBetriebsangestellte
fields.label: 2.2f Verpflegung (Personen zu CHF 6120.– pro Jahr)
fields.description: Imputed value of board (Verpflegung) provided to farm employees, at the standard rate of CHF 6,120 per person per year (per the companion Wegleitung's own Merkblatt NL 1/2007 employer-side Naturallohnabzug table).

fields.name: unterkunftBetriebsangestellte
fields.label: 2.2f Unterkunft (% vom Eigenmietwert)
fields.description: Imputed value of lodging (Unterkunft) provided to farm employees, computed as a percentage of the imputed rental value (Eigenmietwert) of the staff quarters.

fields.name: schuldzinsen
fields.label: 2.2g Schuld- und Pachtzinsen — Schuldzinsen
fields.description: Interest paid on business debt. Per the form's own footnote, for debt secured on a mixed-use property that is predominantly privately used, this interest should instead be declared on the Schuldenverzeichnis with a transfer into Ziffer 12 of the main return.

fields.name: pachtzinsenAlpzinsen
fields.label: 2.2g Schuld- und Pachtzinsen — Pachtzinsen, Alpzinsen
fields.description: Lease payments and alpine-pasture (Alp) rent paid.

fields.name: beitraegeAhvAusgleichskasseBetriebsinhaber
fields.label: 2.2h Beiträge an AHV-Ausgleichskasse für Betriebsinhaber
fields.description: The farm operator's own AHV/IV/EO compensation-fund contributions.

fields.name: andereGeschaeftsaufwendungenRestlicheBetriebskosten
fields.label: 2.2i Andere Geschäftsaufwendungen und restliche Betriebskosten
fields.description: Other business expenses and remaining operating costs. Per the companion Wegleitung zum Hilfsblatt B (whose rules apply by reference to Hilfsblatt G), this line may instead be claimed as a flat-rate estimate set by the tax authorities — in the Talzone, CHF 650 per ha of Wies-/Ackerland plus CHF 150 per Mutterschwein, CHF 9 per sold Mastschwein, CHF 3.50 per sold Jager, CHF 3.50 per Legehenne, and CHF 25 per Are of special crop branches; in the Berggebiet/voralpine Hügelzone, CHF 1,000 per Rindergrossvieheinheit (GVE) plus CHF 170 per Mutterschwein, CHF 12 per sold Mastschwein, and CHF 4 each per sold Jager/Legehenne — in which case Ziffer 2.2a/2.2b (Talzone) or 2.2a-2.2h (Berggebiet/vHz) are not also separately claimed at their actual amounts, and usual private-use shares are already reflected in the flat rate (so Ziffer 2.1g is ordinarily left blank).

fields.name: totalBetriebsaufwendungen
fields.label: 2.2 Total Betriebsaufwendungen
fields.description: Total business expenses: duengerSaatgutPflanzenschutz plus hagelversicherungspraemie plus uebrigeKostenPflanzenbau plus treibUndSchmierstoffe plus repUnterhaltKleinwerkzeuge plus arbeitenDurchDritte plus futterzukaufFuttergeldRindvieh plus futterzukaufSchweine plus futterGefluegelAndereTiere plus tierarztMedikamenteBesamung plus uebrigeKostenTierhaltung plus liegenschaftenUnterhaltskosten plus zwischentotalAbgaengeAbschreibungen plus barloehne plus sozialleistungenAngestellte plus verpflegungBetriebsangestellte plus unterkunftBetriebsangestellte plus schuldzinsen plus pachtzinsenAlpzinsen plus beitraegeAhvAusgleichskasseBetriebsinhaber plus andereGeschaeftsaufwendungenRestlicheBetriebskosten. Feeds reineinkuenfte (Ziffer 2.3) together with totalBetriebseinkuenfte.

fields.name: reineinkuenfte
fields.label: 2.3 Reineinkünfte
fields.description: Net farm/forestry income: totalBetriebseinkuenfte minus totalBetriebsaufwendungen. Transfers to the main return's own Ziffer 2 (self-employment income, ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen), per this form's own printed transfer caption ('zu übertragen in Ziffer 2 der Steuererklärung') and independently corroborated by the companion Wegleitung's own Hilfsblatt-B guidance for the structurally equivalent Ziffer 1.6 line ('Übertrag in Ziffer 2 der Steuererklärung').

fields.name: bewirtschafteteFlaechenSummary
fields.label: 3.1 Bewirtschaftete Flächen (itemized municipality/canton/country rows)
fields.description: Free-text summary of the itemized rows of the Ziffer 3.1 land-use table: for each municipality within Canton Zürich (up to 3 named rows), each municipality in another canton (up to 2 named rows, captioned 'In anderen Kantonen'), and each foreign country (captioned 'Im Ausland', by Staat), the area owned (Eigentum, in ha/a), the area leased (Pacht, in ha/a), and the lease payment (Pachtzins, CHF). Collapsed to one free-text field per this registry's established treatment of unbounded, filer-named repeating rows (see e.g. ch/zh/sta/schuldenverzeichnis, ch/zh/sta/liegenschaftenverzeichnis); the table's own fixed 'Total' row is instead modelled individually as totalEigentumHa, totalPachtHa, and totalPachtzinsChf below, since a single aggregate total line is a bounded, fixed-shape figure. A Pachtlandverzeichnis (leased-land register) may be attached in support, per the form's own instruction ('evtl. Pachtlandverzeichnis beilegen').

fields.name: totalEigentumHa
fields.label: 3.1 Total — Eigentum (ha)
fields.description: Total owned agricultural/forestry land area across all rows of bewirtschafteteFlaechenSummary, in hectares (the form's own separate 'a' (Are) box is folded into this decimal hectare figure; 1 a = 0.01 ha).

fields.name: totalPachtHa
fields.label: 3.1 Total — Pacht (ha)
fields.description: Total leased agricultural/forestry land area across all rows of bewirtschafteteFlaechenSummary, in hectares (same ha/a folding convention as totalEigentumHa).

fields.name: totalPachtzinsChf
fields.label: 3.1 Total — Pachtzins (CHF)
fields.description: Total lease payments across all rows of bewirtschafteteFlaechenSummary.

fields.name: bodennutzungWiesenWeiden
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Wiesen, Weiden (ha)
fields.description: Area used as meadow/pasture, in hectares.

fields.name: bodennutzungSilomaisFutterrueben
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Silomais, Futterrüben (ha)
fields.description: Area used for silage maize and fodder beet, in hectares.

fields.name: bodennutzungGetreideMaisRapsErbsen
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Getreide, Mais, Raps, Erbsen (ha)
fields.description: Area used for cereals, maize, rapeseed, and peas, in hectares.

fields.name: bodennutzungKartoffelnZuckerrueben
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Kartoffeln, Zuckerrüben (ha)
fields.description: Area used for potatoes and sugar beet, in hectares.

fields.name: bodennutzungObstanlagenOhneUnternutzen
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Obstanlagen ohne Unternutzen (ha)
fields.description: Area used for orchards without understorey cultivation, in hectares.

fields.name: bodennutzungGemueseBeerenReben
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Gemüse, Beeren, Reben (ha)
fields.description: Area used for vegetables, berries, and vines, in hectares.

fields.name: bodennutzungAndere
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Andere (ha)
fields.description: Area used for any other crop/land-use category not separately itemized, in hectares.

fields.name: totalLandwirtschaftlicheNutzflaeche
fields.label: 3.2 Total landw. Nutzfläche (ha)
fields.description: Total agricultural utilized area: bodennutzungWiesenWeiden plus bodennutzungSilomaisFutterrueben plus bodennutzungGetreideMaisRapsErbsen plus bodennutzungKartoffelnZuckerrueben plus bodennutzungObstanlagenOhneUnternutzen plus bodennutzungGemueseBeerenReben plus bodennutzungAndere. Together with bodennutzungWald, should reconcile to the combined Eigentum-plus-Pacht area reported at Ziffer 3.1 (totalEigentumHa plus totalPachtHa), since Ziffer 3.2 breaks the same operated land down by use.

fields.name: bodennutzungWald
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Wald (ha)
fields.description: Forested area, in hectares — reported separately from totalLandwirtschaftlicheNutzflaeche since forest is not agricultural utilized area, but is part of the same operated land reported at Ziffer 3.1.

fields.name: bodennutzungObstbaeumeAnzahl
fields.label: 3.2 Bodennutzung — Obstbäume (St.)
fields.description: Number of individual fruit trees (Obstbäume), counted in Stück (St.) rather than area, since scattered/standard fruit trees are not necessarily grouped into a discrete orchard area.

fields.name: tierhaltungKueheStiere
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Kühe, Stiere (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of cows and bulls held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungAufzuchtrindvieh
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Aufzuchtrindvieh (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of young/rearing cattle held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungMastrindvieh
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Mastrindvieh (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of fattening cattle held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungMutterschweine
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Mutterschweine (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of breeding sows held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungMastschweineJager
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Mastschweine, Jager (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of fattening pigs and weaners (Jager) held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungPferde
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Pferde (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of horses held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungZiegenSchafe
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Ziegen, Schafe (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of goats and sheep held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungGefluegel
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Geflügel (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of poultry held at the business year-end.

fields.name: tierhaltungAndere
fields.label: 3.3 Tierhaltung — Andere (Anzahl)
fields.description: Number of any other animals held at the business year-end, not separately itemized above.

fields.name: milchkontingentKg
fields.label: 3.3 Milchkontingent (kg)
fields.description: The farm's milk production quota/contingent, in kilograms. The form's own column header additionally prints 'Anzahl' once for the whole Ziffer 3.3 table; this is interpreted as the head-count column heading applying uniformly to each of the nine animal-category rows above (each modelled as its own Anzahl field), not as a second value tied specifically to the milk quota — see VERIFICATION.md for this disclosed reading of a genuinely ambiguous print layout.

fields.name: direktzahlungenInsgesamt
fields.label: 3.4 Direktzahlungen, insgesamt
fields.description: Total direct payments (federal/cantonal agricultural subsidies) received, only completed when the taxpayer also receives Familienzulagen (family allowances, declared separately on the main return's own Ziffer 3.4). Equal to the sum of allgemeineHangbeitraegeBund, allgemeineHangbeitraegeKanton, soemmerungsbeitraegeBund, soemmerungsbeitraegeKanton, and tierhaltungErschwerendeProduktionsbedingungen below; ordinarily the same total already included within besondereLeistungenBundKanton (Ziffer 2.1d), for which this section provides the itemized subsidy-type breakdown.

fields.name: ackerbaubeitraegeInsgesamt
fields.label: 3.4 Ackerbaubeiträge, insgesamt (müssen in den Betriebseinkünften enthalten sein)
fields.description: Total arable-farming subsidies received — a disclosure figure the form requires to already be included within Betriebseinkünfte (specifically within ertraegeAckerbau, Ziffer 2.1a), not an additional amount to add.

fields.name: allgemeineHangbeitraegeBund
fields.label: 3.4 davon entfallen auf — allgemeine Hangbeiträge Bund
fields.description: Portion of direktzahlungenInsgesamt attributable to federal general slope-farming (Hangbeiträge) payments.

fields.name: allgemeineHangbeitraegeKanton
fields.label: 3.4 davon entfallen auf — allgemeine Hangbeiträge Kanton
fields.description: Portion of direktzahlungenInsgesamt attributable to cantonal general slope-farming (Hangbeiträge) payments.

fields.name: soemmerungsbeitraegeBund
fields.label: 3.4 davon entfallen auf — Sömmerungsbeiträge Bund
fields.description: Portion of direktzahlungenInsgesamt attributable to federal alpine-summering (Sömmerung) payments.

fields.name: soemmerungsbeitraegeKanton
fields.label: 3.4 davon entfallen auf — Sömmerungsbeiträge Kanton
fields.description: Portion of direktzahlungenInsgesamt attributable to cantonal alpine-summering (Sömmerung) payments.

fields.name: tierhaltungErschwerendeProduktionsbedingungen
fields.label: 3.4 davon entfallen auf — Tierhaltung, erschwerende Produktionsbedingungen
fields.description: Portion of direktzahlungenInsgesamt attributable to payments for livestock-keeping under difficult production conditions.

fields.name: kaelbermast
fields.label: 3.5 Spezialbetriebszweige — Kälbermast
fields.description: Whether the business operates a calf-fattening special branch (Kälbermast).

fields.name: pferdezucht
fields.label: 3.5 Spezialbetriebszweige — Pferdezucht
fields.description: Whether the business operates a horse-breeding special branch (Pferdezucht).

fields.name: pensionspferde
fields.label: 3.5 Spezialbetriebszweige — Pensionspferde
fields.description: Whether the business operates a livery/boarding-horse special branch (Pensionspferde).

fields.name: pouletmast
fields.label: 3.5 Spezialbetriebszweige — Pouletmast
fields.description: Whether the business operates a broiler-chicken-fattening special branch (Pouletmast).

fields.name: viehhandel
fields.label: 3.5 Spezialbetriebszweige — Viehhandel
fields.description: Whether the business engages in livestock trading (Viehhandel) as a special branch.

fields.name: andereSpezialbetriebszweige
fields.label: 3.5 Spezialbetriebszweige — andere
fields.description: Free-text description of any other special operating branch not listed among the five named checkboxes.

fields.name: produktionszone
fields.label: 3.6 Produktionszone
fields.description: The agricultural production zone the business's land is classified under, which determines eligibility thresholds for using this simplified Hilfsblatt G (vs. Hilfsblatt B) and the applicable flat-rate deduction schedule for Ziffer 2.2i.

fields.name: adresseVerkaeufer
fields.label: 3.7 Liegenschaftenkäufe und -verkäufe — Adresse Verkäufer
fields.description: Address of the seller in a real-estate sale the business made during the year.

fields.name: chfVerkaufspreis
fields.label: 3.7 Liegenschaftenkäufe und -verkäufe — CHF (Verkauf)
fields.description: Sale price of the property sold, corresponding to adresseVerkaeufer.

fields.name: adresseKaeufer
fields.label: 3.7 Liegenschaftenkäufe und -verkäufe — Adresse Käufer
fields.description: Address of the seller from whom the business purchased real estate during the year (the form's own printed caption groups both transaction directions under one Ziffer 3.7 heading, 'Liegenschaftenkäufe und -verkäufe').

fields.name: chfKaufpreis
fields.label: 3.7 Liegenschaftenkäufe und -verkäufe — CHF (Kauf)
fields.description: Purchase price of the property bought, corresponding to adresseKaeufer.

fields.name: anderesGewerbeAlsNebenbetrieb
fields.label: 3.8 Anderes Gewerbe als Nebenbetrieb — Tätigkeit
fields.description: Whether income from another trade/business run alongside the farm as a secondary operation is already included in the Reineinkünfte reported above, or is instead declared separately on the sibling self-employment worksheet (ch/zh/sta/hilfsblatt-a-vereinfachte-buchfuehrung or ch/zh/sta/hilfsblatt-a-kaufmaennische-buchfuehrung, depending on that other business's own bookkeeping method).

fields.name: bemerkungenBeilagen
fields.label: Bemerkungen/Beilagen
fields.description: Free-text remarks and a list of any documents attached in support of this worksheet (e.g. a Pachtlandverzeichnis for Ziffer 3.1).

fields.name: placeOfSigning
fields.label: Ort und Datum — Ort
fields.description: Place where the worksheet is signed.

fields.name: dateOfSigning
fields.label: Ort und Datum — Datum
fields.description: Date the worksheet is signed.

documents.label: Das Hilfsblatt ist vollständig und wahrheitsgetreu ausgefüllt
documents.statement: Dieses Hilfsblatt ist vollständig und wahrheitsgetreu ausgefüllt.

steps.title: Ort, Datum und Unterschrift (place, date, and signature)
